case_title: SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE VS. DTL COMPANY INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.67 FILED BY SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DTL COMPANY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY DTL COMPANY INC.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED MAY-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DTL COMPANY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DTL COMPANY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNRISE AUTO SERVICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DTL COMPANY INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT DEFENDANT AUTHORIZED REPAIRS. THERE WAS NO WRITTEN ESTIMATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT DTL COMPANY INC. ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
